## Nyman2011 - Hierarchical insulin signaling and glucose homeostasis (BIOMD0000000356)
- **Model ID:** BIOMD0000000356
- **Model Name:** Nyman2011 - Hierarchical insulin signaling and glucose homeostasis
- **Paper Title:** A hierarchical whole-body modeling approach elucidates the link between in vitro insulin signaling and in vivo glucose homeostasis
- **Paper Publication Date:** 2011-07
- **Paper Link:** https://doi.org/10.1074/jbc.M110.188987
- **DOI:** 10.1074/jbc.M110.188987
- **BioModels Status:** Yes - curated
- **Model Type:** Mathematical Modelling Ontology: ordinary differential equation model
- **Temporal Scale:** 1min-<1hr
- **Atlas Scale:** whole body
- **System Modeled:** Insulin signaling linked to adipose glucose uptake and whole-body glucose homeostasis
- **Anatomical Structures:** Adipose tissue;Blood circulatory system
- **Uberon IDs:** UBERON:0001013;UBERON:0004535
- **Cell Types:** Adipocyte
- **CL IDs:** CL:0000136
- **Key Biomolecules:** INS;INSR;AKT2;SLC2A4
- **HGNC IDs:** HGNC:6081;HGNC:6091;HGNC:392;HGNC:11009
- **Mapping Confidence:** High
- **Primary HRA Linkage Rationale (LLM inferred):** Best HRA anchor is adipose tissue;adipocyte, because the model explicitly bridges adipocyte insulin signaling to systemic glucose handling.
- **Mapping Notes:** Whole-body physiology is broader than a single tissue ontology mapping;adipose is the clearest direct atlas link.
- **Primary Source URL:** https://www.biomodels.org/BIOMD0000000356
